title: Materials Science Deep III: Quantum Materials & Emergent Phenomena

fractionalization.holon: EML-∞ (charge without spin — not in any EML-finite Fock space)
fractionalization.reason: Topological order: cannot be reduced to product state (EML-finite)

strongly_correlated.key_insight: Kondo T_K = EML-1; fractionalized particles = EML-∞

fqhe.topological_order: Ground state degeneracy = 3^genus (EML-0 count); topological order = EML-∞
fqhe.key_insight: FQHE: Hall conductance = EML-0; Laughlin WF = EML-3; topological order = EML-∞

quantum_spin_liquids.key_insight: Spinon dispersion = EML-2; emergent gauge field = EML-∞ (genuine emergence)

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Hall conductance ν*e²/h, frustration ratio J2/J1, topological degeneracy
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Kondo resistivity, spinon dispersion E(k)=√((v_s k)²+Δ²)
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Fractionalization, topological order, emergent gauge fields, non-Abelian anyons

key_theorem: The EML Quantum Materials Emergence Theorem: Single-particle physics is EML-2 (band structure, effective mass). Kondo physics is EML-1 (exponential in 1/coupling). All genuine many-body emergent phenomena — fractionalization, topological order, non-Abelian anyons, emergent gauge fields — are EML-∞: they cannot be expressed as EML-finite functions of single-particle operators.
rabbit_hole_log: Kondo T_K = exp(-1/JN₀) = EML-1: same structure as BCS gap!
Fractionalization: electron splits into holon + spinon = EML-∞ (beyond Fock space)
FQHE Hall conductance ν*e²/h = EML-0: topological invariant
Non-Abelian anyons = EML-∞: topological quantum computing would run on EML-∞ substrate
Emergent gauge field in spin liquid = EML-∞: not in any EML-finite Hamiltonian

connections.S58_topology: Topological order = EML-0 invariants + EML-∞ ground state
